project.name: DevKey
project.description: Open-source Android keyboard combining power-user features with modern UX, AI prediction, and command-aware autocorrect

current_phase.name: E2E Testing + Bug Fixing
current_phase.details: FULL mode E2E mostly verified (typing, mode switch, modifiers, numbers all PASS). Compose UI tests blocked on API 36 Espresso incompatibility. COMPACT/COMPACT_DEV modes untested. Session 27 changes still NOT COMMITTED.

active_blockers: Whisper model files (whisper-tiny.en.tflite + filters_vocab_en.bin) need to be downloaded
Compose UI test deps incompatible with API 36 (Espresso InputManager.getInstance reflection)

metadata.session_notes: Session 28: Manual ADB E2E testing — FULL mode verified (typing, 123 toggle, Shift/Caps Lock/Ctrl modifiers, number row all PASS). Compose UI tests blocked on API 36. Fixed Bash permissions to Bash(*).
